name: Akrivia HCM
description: Create a thriving culture with performance management that is rewarding for your organization. Learn more about Akrivia HCM

reviews.review_title: Akrivia HCM - The best HRMS Tool
reviews.review_description: Overall, I have had a excellent with this program since I am able to find all the HR functions that we need and also helps us manage our business in the most efficient method and assists us to increase employee productivity because analysis is easy to do with this software.
reviews.review_pros: This program has helped me from Hire to the retirement of an employee since it performs all functions that is needed by HR departments like hiring (from screen to automated offer letters) and task assignment. payroll management, time control (attendance as well as leave) and many more. It is the best thing that it has a facial recognition for attendance and will also assist you with electronic onboarding. The functions you use with your mobile phone as well.
reviews.review_cons: I don't think that support staff should be more helpful to help us in resolving our issue.

reviews.review_pros: The product is great, It has almost all the features that an organization needs starting from hire to retire
reviews.review_cons: There are nothing specific but UX can be even better.

reviews.review_title: One software have all the feature from Hire to Retire related function
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Overall it is very useful software which also work for large organization and make easy to handle all the HR function. You can easily access from anywhere.
reviews.review_pros: It has feature from Hire to Retire related all the functions. It is like one software with help you to manage all the HR related function as it cover whole life cycle of employee in an organization. This software also available on your phone so it is very easy to use from anywhere also it has very cooperative customer support which is available every time when anyone need.
reviews.review_cons: It has nothing which I don't like but it will be helpful if you launch for iOS.

reviews.review_title: A robust and versatile HRMS software
reviews.review_description: The application's ability to handle all aspects of human resources management systems makes it a valuable tool for organizations seeking to streamline their complete employee life cycle process.
reviews.review_pros: This software allows you to purchase only those features that meet your business needs and upgrade easily as your business grows.
reviews.review_cons: I have not encountered any problems that are significant enough to warrant attention.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Akrivia HCM has many additional features, and everything is organized in a way that makes it easy to locate the information we need. The program also has a high level of flexibility, which allows us to customize it according to our business needs.
reviews.review_pros: We have recently made several improvements to our Human Resources department, including streamlining processes such as onboarding, 360-degree feedback, and biometric integration. The result is that we are now paperless—something we've always wanted to achieve.
reviews.review_cons: The Akrivia HCM software could improve its employee management feature by speeding up the time it takes to access this function.

reviews.review_title: Payroll software with a user friendly interface
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Akrivia HCM is a comprehensive payroll management system that makes processing your employees' payrollsa breeze. It allows you to generate payslips and other employee documents in-house with no additional tools necessary. Your employees can access their information from any device, at any time, through the Akrivia mobile app.
reviews.review_pros: Akrivia HCM continues to develop and upgrade its features to keep up with the latest technological advancements.
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes, the mobile app fails to record employee punches accurately, and the HR department automaticallyregularizes them.

reviews.review_title: A best HRMS Software for small to big business enterprises. We love Akrivia HCM!
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: I appreciated it more than other recruiting software I've utilized. It makes work simpler and assists me with being a director rather than a paper pusher.
reviews.review_pros: The number of functions and features. Our organization changed from no HR framework to utilizing Akrivia HCM and it is mind blowing, how much more proficient we are. We can follow changes to a particular worker and PTO in one area. It is enormous how effective Akrivia HCM has been for us.
reviews.review_cons: It is a very good software and there is no dislikes from my side.

reviews.review_title: All HR tasks can be managed easily with this best HR software - Akrivia HCM
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: AkriviaHCM has been implemented completely at our organization. In addition, it eliminated many processes and papers that were based on paper.
reviews.review_pros: The user interface of AkriviaHCM is very user-friendly. You can navigate easily and use it easily. In addition to payment details and time off, it shows many more benefits of our company. This software has been a huge success for us.
reviews.review_cons: You can easily master the system and use it. I didn't find any errors in this software, so I don't have any dislikes.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Akrivia HCM is an excellent application to keep track of all of our employees' information. Akrivia HCM is a fantastic Human Resource solution that has served us well in our company. We have many employees, thus being able to track their data in one place is incredibly beneficial.
reviews.review_cons: There is nothing to dislike about Akrivia HCM . It meets all of our Organizational requirements.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Akrivia HCM has many features, including an employee feedback and recognition feature and a performance tracking module, and we can also request praise or recognition from other employees.
reviews.review_cons: Until now, there have been no cons, and everything is according to expectation.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: It Simplify the Global Payroll System, Seamless Integration with Real time Recruitment and Attendance Records Tracking. Overall I would love to recommend this software for all kind of business.
reviews.review_pros: It Simplifies Global Payroll Process, End to End Digital Onboarding process, Easy to track and report the time & Attendance management, Effective Performance Appraisal system. Etc.
reviews.review_cons: Very complex to use... No dislikes for this software. I just loved it

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: The user interface is reasonable and simple to use. The format is quite simple, but it is capable of handling complicated circumstances.
reviews.review_cons: Till now we are fine with this HCM software. I wish I fell the same in coming days.

reviews.review_title: Most popular HRMS Software for Enterprises.
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Akrivia HCM simplifies administrative tasks for our entire company, such as requesting vacation, entering goals/career development items, and searching internal job postings. I particularly like the format for performance and development reviews that they provide. I think this is a dreaded quarterly task for the majority of people, but Akrivia HCM provides a quick and simple way for our team to input their goals.
reviews.review_cons: I don’t have any point to dislike this software. Everything is fine!!!

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Akrivia HCM runs smoothly with heavy features, which is the core benefit of this software. It offers all the features like geo-tagging and geo-fencing, biometric integration, and shift scheduling.
reviews.review_cons: I wish if there was a face recognition feature integrated into the application.
